items.markdown:
White label reporting tools `allow agencies to rebrand analytics dashboards (DashThis, AgencyAnalytics, Reportz) with their own logo, colors, and custom domains, presenting data as in-house work` . Key features include automated client reporting, custom email addresses, and API integrations with platforms like Google Analytics and SEO tools.[](https://dashthis.com/white-label/#:~:text=DashThis%20is%20a%20white%20label%20reporting%20tool,**Your%20own%20logo**%20*%20**Custom%20email%20address**) [[1]](https://dashthis.com/white-label/)[[2]](https://reportz.io/seo-reports/)[[3]](https://trackright.com/white-label-reporting/)[[4]](https://seranking.com/white-label.html)

**Top White Label Reporting Tools by Agency Size** 

- **1–10 Clients (Budget-Focused):** [Reporting Ninja](https://www.reportingninja.com/blog/best-white-label-marketing-tools) ($20-$120/mo) or [Swydo](https://www.swydo.com/blog/best-white-label-reporting-tools/) ($69/mo base).
- **10–30 Clients (Balanced):** [DashThis](https://dashthis.com/white-label/) ($409+/mo) for speed/templates, or Swydo ($69+/mo) for scalability.
- **30–50 Clients (Comprehensive):** AgencyAnalytics ($179/mo).
- **50+ Clients (Enterprise):** TapClicks ($900-$1,400+ realistic) for data unification.[](https://www.swydo.com/blog/best-white-label-reporting-tools/) [[1]](https://www.swydo.com/blog/best-white-label-reporting-tools/)

**Key Features and Examples** 

- **DashThis:** Focuses on ease of use, offering 100% white-label dashboards, custom domains, and automated emails.
- **[Reportz](https://reportz.io/seo-reports/):** Specializes in SEO/marketing, integrating directly with Ahrefs, SEMRush, and Google Analytics.
- **[SE Ranking](https://seranking.com/white-label.html):** Provides a fully customizable, branded SEO report including custom color schemes, logos, and header/footer options.
- **[Zoho Analytics](https://www.zoho.com/analytics/white-label-reporting-tool.html):** Offers extensive BI capabilities with over 50 chart types, No-Code/Low-Code customizations, and secure, embedded analytics.
- **Windsor.ai:** Known for affordable pricing and automatic data blending across channels (free for one data source).[](https://dashthis.com/white-label/#:~:text=DashThis%20is%20a%20white%20label%20reporting%20tool,**Your%20own%20logo**%20*%20**Custom%20email%20address**) [[1]](https://dashthis.com/white-label/)[[2]](https://reportz.io/seo-reports/)[[3]](https://seranking.com/white-label.html)[[4]](https://www.zoho.com/analytics/white-label-reporting-tool.html)[[5]](https://portermetrics.com/en/compare/white-label-reporting-tools/)

This video shows you how to set up white-label reports in a few simple steps:![Related video thumbnail](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05120926-3675-0139-0000-1d9d399e80c8:6)
59s[How to Create White Label Reports and Report Templates![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05120926-3675-0139-0000-1d9d399e80c8:7)
![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05120926-3675-0139-0000-1d9d399e80c8:8)
SEOptimer YouTube• Jul 17, 2025](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a15Ax2_Wkno&t=71) These tools are crucial for agencies looking to provide professional, consistent branding to clients while saving time on manual report creation.[](https://reportz.io/seo-reports/#:~:text=Some%20SEO%20reporting%20tools%20include:%20*%20**Reportz**,on%20core%20activities%20*%20Provide%20real-time%20insights) [[1]](https://reportz.io/seo-reports/)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pBpi5y3cGfU)[[3]](https://www.cloudcampaign.com/smm-tips/what-is-white-label-reporting)[[4]](https://trackright.com/white-label-reporting/)

expanded_element.title: What is White-label Reporting? - Jaspersoft
expanded_element.description: White-label reporting is when a detailed report by an organization is completed and then saved as a basic template, which is intended to be rebranded and used by other companies. For example, if a company consults with multiple clients, they will need to turn in regular reports on their work progress and other details.

items.title: What is a white label tool?

expanded_element.title: White-Label Software | EPAM SolutionsHub
expanded_element.description: White-label software is a product developed by one company but rebranded and sold by other companies as their own software. This practice helps businesses offer software solutions they did not have to invest in by developing the technology.
